name: Wuhan Zhongyuan Huadian Science & Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Zhongyuan Huadian Science & Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the smart grid, medical health, and industrial investment businesses in China. The company is involved in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and service of power system dynamic recording systems, power system time synchronization and measurement systems, intelligent power grid instrumentation systems, 110kV and below voltage level substation integrated automation systems, intelligent distribution network scheduling systems, and energy Internet system integration and intelligent equipment, as well as medical information and clinical in vitro diagnostic related products. It also provides energy Internet planning, design, operation and maintenance, and consulting services. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Wuhan, China.
